Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonathan Fried, Esq. attorney at law (415-986-7000) for Place of Franks, LLC Plaintiff and moving party.
Marc E. Rohatiner, Esq. of Wolf, Rifkin, Shapiro, Schulman & Rabkin LLP, (310-478-4100) for P&TK Properties, LLC Defendants and opposing party. Appearing through CourtCall.

After hearing arguments from Plaintiff's counsel; Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF PLACE OF FRANKS, LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration is DENIED without Prejudice. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk B. Paredes, Not Reported. (501)

Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause And A Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Jun-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Fried, Esq. (415-986-7000) for Place of Franks, LLC, plaintiff and moving party / Marc E. Rohatiner, Esq. (310-478-4100) for P & T K Properties LLC, appearing through court call, for defendant and opposing party.

Mr. Rohatiner confirms to the Court that the loan is paid off and sale of property will be vacated. Court rules now as follows: Plaintiff Place of Frank, LLC's Order To Show Cause And A Temporary Restraining Order is taken OFF CALENDAR. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
